features: POWERFUL DEGREASER FORMULA: Packed with grease-busting action, this washing up liquid cuts through stubborn grime fast. Ideal for removing baked-on food from pots, pans, and plates after hearty meals or family roasts.

EASY SQUEEZY BOTTLE: The soft, squeezable design makes it easy to control each use. Great for quick top-ups in a busy kitchen or when scrubbing greasy trays in the washing up bowl after Sunday dinner.
STAND-UP DESIGN, NO MESS: Designed to stay upright with no spills or sticky puddles. Simply stand it by the sink and enjoy mess-free cleaning every time – no leaks, no fuss, no waste.
FRESH FRAGRANT SCENTS: Choose from Apple, Lemon, Grapefruit or Eucalyptus – each one leaving dishes and kitchens smelling clean and uplifting. Perfect for everyday use in any home.

SAFE FOR ALL KITCHENWARE: Gentle on hands but tough on grease, this dish soap is safe for glassware, cutlery, crockery, pans, and even hobs and sinks. A true all-rounder in the world of cleaning products.
PERFECT FOR BUSY HOMES: Whether it's weekday dinners, baking mess or after-school snacks, this versatile washing up liquid handles it all. Keeps sinks fresh and dishes gleaming with minimal effort.
RELIABLE BRAND PERFORMANCE: From the trusted Elbow Grease range – known for hardworking cleaning products that don’t let you down. A dependable favourite in UK households.
IDEAL FOR SMALL OR LARGE LOADS: Available in 450ml or 700ml, it's ideal for solo kitchens or family-sized messes. Always ready to tackle whatever’s in the washing up bowl.
SAVES TIME AND EFFORT: Cuts down scrubbing time by loosening stubborn grease quickly. Great for cleaning up after fried breakfasts, roast dinners or creamy pasta nights.
CLEANING ESSENTIAL: A must-have for every kitchen sink and under-sink cupboard. Makes washing up quicker, cleaner, and even a little more enjoyable with every squeeze.
description: Product Description Make washing up feel less like a chore with Elbow Grease Stand Up Washing Up Liquid – a powerful degreaser packed into a mess-free, easy-squeezy bottle. Designed to cut through stubborn grease and baked-on food, this dish soap is tough on grime but kind to hands, helping every kitchen sparkle with ease. Whether cleaning up after a hearty family roast or tackling everyday breakfast dishes, the fast-acting formula works wonders in sinks, on hobs, and across every corner of the washing up bowl. Choose from four invigorating scents – fresh Apple, zingy Lemon, zesty Grapefruit or cooling Eucalyptus – and enjoy a more fragrant, satisfying clean. The stand-up bottle stays tidy on the counter or sink edge, with no leaks or sticky residue left behind. Elbow Grease continues to lead the way in reliable, hard-working cleaning products that households across the UK love and trust. Ideal for kitchens of all sizes and a must-have in any cleaning cupboard. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: 5 to 15% Anionic Surfactants, <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, <5% Amphoteric Surfactants, Disodium EDTA, Parfum, Limonene, Benzyl Benzoate, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone. Directions Remove inner cap before using. Squeeze for 2 seconds into a sink with warm running water. Simply stand up bottle when finished. No mess or leaks. Not suitable for use on clothing or fabrics. See more
